## {project_name} {version}

One-sentence summary of what this release improves.

### Highlights

- Main package or visual-style improvement
- Main documentation, manuscript, or demo improvement
- Main verification or release-quality improvement

### Added

- New style support, helper, figure, or package-facing artifact
- New documentation, manuscript support, or release asset

### Improved

- Better theme behavior, demo fidelity, or package usability
- Better reproducibility, verification, or package presentation

### Fixed

- Clarified a style claim, demo mismatch, or documentation ambiguity
- Reduced friction between the package code and manuscript/demo materials

### Who this helps

- R users reproducing familiar software styles
- Manuscript and demo reviewers
- Users who want one-call style switching on top of ggplot2

### Recommended next step

- Read `README.md`
- Run the demo or inspect the latest pkgdown site
- Check `CHANGELOG.md` and the release notes before updating your local copy
